rationale: Educ. Code §25.084 governs year-round school calendars and their effect on Chapter 48 state funding. It does not reference homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal values, so no direct conflict exists.
quote: Except as provided by Subsection (c), the operation of schools year-round by a district does not affect the amount of state funds to which the district is entitled under Chapter 48.
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect fiscal interaction via Chapter 48 funding formulas is possible but not evidenced in this rule text.
